chapter_title.en: The Tenth Assembly, which is Tuesday, Ten Days remaining from Sha`ban, 367 AH.

text: 2 - وسئل الصادق (عليه السلام) عن قول الله عزوجل: (أو لم نعمركم ما يتذكر فيه من تذكر) (2) فقال: توبيخ لابن ثماني عشرة سنة (3).

en.bilal-muhammad: Al-Sadiq (as) was asked about the saying of Allah, “Did We not give you lives long enough so that whoever wanted to be mindful could have done so?” [35:37] So, he said: A rebuke to one who has reached eighteen years of age.
